name: Boeing

overview.value: Boeing's space business builds the CST-100 Starliner reusable crew capsule, government and commercial satellites, the Space Launch System heavy-lift rocket, and the X-37B autonomous spaceplane, while also supporting International Space Station operations. It works with United Launch Alliance and owns Millennium Space Systems and Spectrolab to expand its launch, small-satellite, and solar-cell capabilities.

base.reason: established aggregator, single reference (audit Phase 3 backfill, 2026-07-08)
